Des: Simple cots in curtained nooks (1 cot per alcove). Clean enough, quiet-ish.
Private rooms with cedar shutters, a writing desk, and a wool quilt. Fitted with a single twin bed.
Spacious upper rooms with private latrines and bell-service. Rooms contain either one queen bed or two doubles—ask at check-in.
A private wing with a hearth, copper tub, lakeside balcony, and a single king-sized bed. Only one available.
